one_time_description: Prior period adjustments including correction of deferred capital contributions, bank balances, prepaid expenses, loan balances, amounts payable to ISC, accounts receivable, accounts payable, and deferred revenue
economic_notes: Nation owns 100% of Beaver Air Services LP (operating as Missinippi Airways) and 44% of Keewatin Railway Co. Ltd. Missinippi Airways had revenues of $16,078,599 and net income of $262,843 for year ended Dec 31, 2019. Keewatin Railway had revenues of $5,781,305 and net income of $989,002 for year ended Dec 31, 2019.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to unreconciled accounts payable sub-ledgers and unverifiable due to/from related party balances. Significant prior period adjustments of $23,254,778 made to opening balances as at April 1, 2019, primarily from correction of deferred capital contribution accounting treatment ($25,182,932). Accumulated surplus increased dramatically from $40,282,970 to $63,973,278 due to these prior period adjustments. Fiscal year is 2020 but audit report signed February 2, 2022 — nearly two years late. Housing expenses_housing combines Capital/Housing ($915,744) and Housing Authority ($660,792). Wages per expenses by object note ($11,583,999) differs slightly from segment total wages ($11,624,189). Prior year 2019 audited by a different firm with unqualified opinion.
